name: ptouch-cradle
description: Two-part desktop cradle + label-catch tray for Brother PT-P750W. Checks tray sliding fit into cradle tray slot, and printer clearance in printer pocket.

parts.name: cradle
parts.description: Cradle body — printer pocket at back (Y=0..160), tray slot at front shelf (Y=160..254.9).

parts.name: tray
parts.description: Label-catch tray in assembled position inside the tray slot. Tray X: centered in 103.9mm slot (slot X=2.05..105.95, tray W=103.2, centering offset=2.35). Tray Y: 160.0 = slot back wall. Tray Z: 4.0 = slot floor (base thickness). Pupil embosses protrude in tray local +Y which becomes cradle front-facing direction (away from slot interior).

parts.name: printer
parts.description: Brother PT-P750W reference box 78x152x143mm at X=15..93, Y=3..155, Z=4..147 inside printer pocket (pocket interior X=14..94, Y=3..157, Z=4+).

interference.description: Tray body must not intersect cradle slot walls or floor — pure clearance fit
Printer reference box must not intersect cradle printer pocket walls or floor

fitSpecs.name: tray-slot-clearance
fitSpecs.description: Sliding fit clearance between tray exterior and cradle slot walls (0.35mm per side spec)

fitSpecs.name: printer-pocket-clearance
fitSpecs.description: Clearance fit between printer reference box and cradle printer pocket walls (1.0mm per side spec)
